dimensions.evidence: Created docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md covering all required elements: stability contract ('Provider IDs are immutable once assigned'), deprecation policy with concurrent old+new IDs ('old ID continues to resolve... while a new ID is introduced alongside it'), changelog expectation ('logged in CHANGELOG.md under a provider-ids subsection'). Also linked from README.md and docs/API.md as optionally specified. No code changes made — correct for a docs deliverable.
Only 3 files changed, all documentation: new docs/PROVIDER_IDS.md, one-line link in README.md, small 'See also' section in docs/API.md. No source code, no unrelated churn.

Substantive 72-line document with canonical ID table (25 providers), concrete deprecation lifecycle steps, and explicit stability guarantees. Not placeholder text. No test files were modified; verify passed green without weakening.

Documentation accurately describes provider-ID stability contract. No source changes, no security or correctness risks. The content aligns with the approved plan and is suitable for integrator consumption.
